sub_modules.ifft16_addr_gen: Combinational radix-2 DIT stage address and twiddle-index generator.
sub_modules.ifft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient lookup table for 16-point IFFT positive-exponential factors.
sub_modules.ifft16_complex_mult: Combinational fixed-point complex multiplier with Q1.15 rounded coefficient scaling.
sub_modules.ifft16_butterfly: Combinational radix-2 complex butterfly using the reusable complex multiplier.
